description: Fault-line hypotheses: predicted divergence points between competitors across terrain types

hypotheses.hypothesis: maproom outperforms on symbol-lookup requiring exact reference chaining
candidate_queries: Trace the call chain from HTTP handler to database query for user authentication
Find every callsite of the deprecated `render_to_string` method and its transitive dependents
Identify which middleware modifies the request context before it reaches the view layer
hypotheses.rationale: Point-lookup terrain rewards precise symbol resolution and reference-chain traversal — capabilities where indexed navigation should dominate over broad search.

hypotheses.hypothesis: explore outperforms on wide initial sweep when system boundary is unknown
candidate_queries: Map all the ways user input reaches the database without parameterization
Catalog every public API endpoint and its authentication requirements
Identify all cross-module dependencies that would break if the messaging subsystem were extracted
hypotheses.rationale: Breadth-scan terrain rewards exploratory strategies that can discover unknown boundaries — favoring agents that cast wide nets before narrowing.

hypotheses.hypothesis: constrained tool budgets favor maproom efficiency
candidate_queries: Find the root cause of the N+1 query in the channel list endpoint using at most 10 tool calls
Determine which configuration flag controls websocket reconnection behavior in under 5 file reads
Locate the authorization check that prevents guest users from accessing admin routes with minimal exploration
hypotheses.rationale: Constrained terrain penalizes wasted tool invocations — agents with efficient navigation strategies should show measurable advantage over brute-force searchers.
